Document:
# Hitman
[color=#999999][italic]"Mission Started."[/italic][/color]
You're an [color=yellow]Criminal[/color], who takes money to kill people. [color=cyan]Your client wants you to kill them in a very perticuler way.[/color] pay attention to your conditions.
##teach your target a lesson your client wants that your client dies once [color=red][italic]by your hand following their specifications[/italic][/color]. - [bold]they need not stay dead. your client only cares that they die, not for how long they are dead[/bold] - [bold]this is your one task, take the time needed to plan it out.[/bold]
##kill the target brutaly your targclient et wants your target to die in some way which would mental scar those who saw it. - [bold]this doesnt mean you have to burn them into ash or otherwise destroy their body.[/bold] burning them to death or filling them with knife wounds can work. - almost all of the methods to furfill this are very loud and overt. either prepare a exit plan or do it far away from any witnesses
##kill the target dramaticly your client wants to make this murder dramatic in a story sense. - you may need to interact with your target socially to set up the correct narrative tension, but remember you need a reason to be talking with them to not seen suspicious. - the best tragedies involve a faults of their victims. knowing what kind of person your target is could help.
##kill the target humorously your client wants to make your targets death a joke. - absurb methods of death are funny. look into what doesnt seem like it could kill but can. - the station and clown has a lot of silly items. searching maintenance tunnels and the clowns room may get you something usefull.
##kill the target cleanly your client doesnt want the targets death to make a mess or otherwise look bad. - any forms of damage which are Internal will be very usefull here. - if one must use more usaul means to finish the kill, reparing the body can stop it from becoming a mess.
##make your targets death look like a accident . your client wants your targets death to not look like a murder. - using or faking regular dangers in their department can go a long way towards making people believe you. - if the body does not get reported as suspicious then its unlikely anyone will guestion it further.
##kill your target indirectly your client doesnt want you anywhere near the body once it drops. they want you to find a remote way of killing them. - the remote signaler can be very usefull for setting up traps or timing kills. - having a method to tell your targets location will likely be very usefull in telling when a trap need be sprung.
##drag out your targets death your client wants your target to suffer. they ask to make their death take a long - healing supplies could be usefull in ensuring they survive longer than usual - by the nature of this, you likely want to make your method quiet or kill them in a place no one will look for them
##Kill your target in a public space your client wants to send a message by having them die where everyone will see - having a method to hide your idenity will be very usefull when you need to do this in front of witnesses - using something to cause panic can be usefull in giving you an opening
##inform your target they are a target your client wants you to inform them they will be assassinated [color=red][bold]long before it happens[/bold][/color] - doing this will almost always put you under suspicion. find a method to hide your idenity or inform them indirectly - doing this early on could make your target grow compliant.
##kill someone close to your target and make sure they know your client wants to mentaly harm your target by killing someone close to them. - the person you kill has to be found out to be dead by your target. this can not be a silent or permanent kill. - you'll need to interact with and stalk your target to figure out who is close to them. - theres no modifers on killing the person close to them.
